name: Una Pizza Napoletana
teaser: Anthony Mangieri is a legend and his take on Neapolitan is wholly singular. Make the pilgrimage.
review: It's not cheap, it's not easy to get in, and it's not 100% consistent, but Anthony Mangieri is a legend, his take on Neapolitan is wholly singular, and it's best to make the pilgrimage before he takes another break.
headsUp: Not 100% consistent, but when it is on there is nothing better in the city.
update: Mangieri is in rare form right now. Go before he takes another hiatus.
address: 175 Orchard St, New York, NY 10002, USA
hours: Monday: Closed · Tuesday: Closed · Wednesday: Closed · Thursday: 5:00 – 9:30 PM · Friday: 5:00 – 9:30 PM · Saturday: 5:00 – 9:30 PM · Sunday: Closed
